evals.prompt: Help me write a clinical case report for journal submission about an unusual presentation of acute myocardial infarction in a 28-year-old. I need it to follow the CARE guidelines with the full structure and an informed-consent statement.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-clinical-reports in case-report mode. Follows the CARE (CAse REport) guidelines structure: title containing 'case report', MeSH keywords, structured abstract, introduction, de-identified patient information (18 HIPAA identifiers removed), clinical findings, timeline, diagnostic assessment, therapeutic interventions, follow-up/outcomes, discussion, and an informed-consent statement for publication.

assertions.value: Structures the report per CARE guidelines with a timeline, de-identification, and an informed-consent-for-publication statement.

evals.prompt: I need to prepare an ICH-E3 clinical study report for our completed Phase 3 trial, including the efficacy summary and serious adverse event narratives for our regulatory submission.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-clinical-reports in clinical-trial-report mode. Structures an ICH-E3 compliant Clinical Study Report (CSR) with efficacy and safety summaries, writes serious adverse event (SAE) narratives, and ensures ICH-GCP and FDA regulatory compliance for the submission.

assertions.value: Produces an ICH-E3 CSR with SAE narratives and references ICH-GCP/regulatory compliance.

evals.prompt: Write up a structured radiology diagnostic report for a chest CT showing a suspicious pulmonary nodule — I want the standard sections (technique, findings, impression) with proper clinical terminology.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-clinical-reports in diagnostic-report mode. Produces a structured radiology report with standard sections (clinical history/indication, technique, findings, impression), uses precise clinical terminology, and follows diagnostic reporting standards.

assertions.value: Generates a structured radiology diagnostic report with technique/findings/impression sections.

evals.prompt: I need a SOAP progress note and a discharge summary for a patient admitted with community-acquired pneumonia. Make sure they're properly de-identified and HIPAA compliant.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-clinical-reports in patient-documentation mode. Produces a SOAP note (Subjective, Objective, Assessment, Plan) and a discharge summary, ensuring HIPAA-compliant de-identification and meeting clinical record documentation standards.

assertions.value: Produces SOAP and discharge documentation with HIPAA-compliant de-identification.

evals.prompt: Create a forward-looking treatment plan for a 55-year-old with newly diagnosed type 2 diabetes, with SMART goals, evidence-based interventions, and a structured follow-up schedule.
evals.expected_output: Does NOT invoke this skill; defers to alterlab-treatment-plans. The ask is a prospective, SMART-goal-based patient care plan, not documentation of past clinical events (case report, diagnostic report, SOAP/discharge note). Clinical-reports documents what happened; treatment-plans plans future care.

evals.prompt: Analyze a cohort of 60 HER2-positive breast cancer patients stratified by hormone receptor status with hazard ratios, Kaplan-Meier survival curves, and GRADE-graded treatment recommendations.
evals.expected_output: Does NOT invoke this skill; defers to alterlab-clinical-decision. The ask is a population-level biomarker-stratified cohort analysis with survival statistics and GRADE evidence grading, not an individual clinical report (case/diagnostic/trial/patient documentation). Clinical-reports handles single-report documentation, not cohort evidence synthesis.
